profiles.about_me: Results-driven Civil Engineering professional with over 3 years of hands-on experience in high-rise residential and commercial construction. Proven track record in end-to-end project supervision from drawing review and contractor coordination to quality control and timely delivery. Adept at managing multi-stakeholder construction sites, enforcing safety standards, and optimizing resources to minimize waste. Committed to delivering projects that meet the highest standards of structural integrity and client satisfaction.

work_experience.description: Reviewed all types of project drawings, including RAJUK, Architectural, Structural and Perspective plans, identifying discrepancies and coordinating with relevant departments for timely corrections. Supervised day-to-day construction activities on-site, ensuring work is executed as per drawings, specifications, and schedule. Coordinated and instructed contractors to execute work according to the planned work program. Prepared monthly work schedules, achievement reports and monitored daily progress to maintain project timelines. Conducted on-site training for workers to enhance skills and ensure superior construction quality. Inspected material quality, enforced safety protocols and ensured the security of both construction activities and workforce. Focused on minimizing material wastage through proper handling and execution oversight. Ensured effective project merchandising and branding throughout the construction period. Maintained high standards of construction quality, ensuring timely project completion and client satisfaction.
work_experience.title: Assistant Project Engineer

work_experience.description: Gained practical experience in rural infrastructure projects, including road and bridge construction. Assisted in field inspections and site supervision under the guidance of senior engineers. Studied engineering drawings and construction documentation relevant to government projects. Developed understanding of project estimation, BOQ preparation and tender evaluation processes. Learned about quality control practices, safety measures and environmental considerations in civil works. Participated in meetings and site visits that deepened understanding of public infrastructure planning and implementation.
work_experience.title: Engineering Intern

This must be supported by total certified payment received for contracts in progress or work complete under Government / semi- Government / autonomous organization of Bangladesh during last 05 years. (ii) Valid VAT Registration Certificate. Please follow the instructions stated in TDS , PCC , ITT , GCC , section 2,4,6, 7, 8, 9 (document tab) of this tender. candidate.about_me: Results-driven Civil Engineering professional with over 3 years of hands-on experience in high-rise residential and commercial construction. Proven track record in end-to-end project supervision from drawing review and contractor coordination to quality control and timely delivery. Adept at managing multi-stakeholder construction sites, enforcing safety standards, and optimizing resources to minimize waste. Committed to delivering projects that meet the highest standards of structural integrity and client satisfaction.

ranked.reasoning: MD RIADDUZZAMAN's 'over 3 years' of experience is substantially less than the 10 years required for the assignment. While he has relevant hands-on supervision and quality control experience in residential/commercial construction and exposure to government projects through an LGED internship, he lacks demonstrated experience with projects of the required scale and value for a government client. His current roles are at a junior level, which does not align with the seniority implied by the project requirements.
strengths: Experience in high-rise residential and commercial construction
Hands-on project supervision, quality control, and contractor coordination
Familiarity with Bangladeshi government entity processes (LGED internship)
Knowledge of BOQ and tender evaluation processes
gaps: Total experience significantly less than 10 years required
No proven experience on a 4-storied RCC building project for a Government/semi-government client of specified value (Tk.1100 Lakh)
Junior-level experience, not senior enough for a consultancy on this scale
No explicit World Bank project experience
Confusing and future-dated work experience timeline
